description_long: This is a single-story kindergarten building with a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout. The structure features large windows on multiple sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces, which are divided into several rooms including classrooms, play areas, and what appears to be a kitchen or dining area. The interior is decorated with colorful patterns and child-friendly motifs, visible through the windows and open sections. The exterior walls are primarily white, with some blue framing around the windows and doors, and the building includes a covered entrance area. There is no visible playground equipment or fencing attached to the building itself. The overall design is functional and inviting, with a focus on safety and accessibility for young children.
description: A modern, single-story kindergarten with large windows, white walls, and colorful, child-friendly interiors visible through open sections.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance area, large windows, and a glimpse into the classrooms and play spaces with colorful decor.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the building, revealing more windows and the open-plan interior layout with distinct room divisions.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the side facade with additional windows and a clear view into the central corridor and classroom arrangement.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side, including the covered entrance and a wide windowed section, with interior spaces visible through the glass.
